title: Run Playwright E2E suite against staging URL (post-deployment gate)
description: Wire the Playwright E2E suite to run against the staging URL in CI. Add a playwright job to .github/workflows/ci.yml that runs on merge to staging branch. Document the manual steps needed before it can fire live. The deliverable is a code change (wiring Playwright into CI against staging), not actually running the suite against a live server right now (since the Cloud Build trigger hasn't been created yet).
acceptance_criteria: Playwright E2E job added to .github/workflows/ci.yml that triggers on push/merge to staging branch
Job configures BASE_URL from staging Cloud Run URL
Job documents (via comments or README note) what manual pre-requisites are needed before it fires live
Existing 4 Playwright specs in tests/e2e/ are the target suite
CI job does not break existing main branch CI pipeline
